lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੁਲਿ ਦਿਤੜੀ ਦੂਰਿ ਨਾ ਆਵੈ ਘਰਿ ਪੇਈਐ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: baabul ditarree door naa aavai ghar peeeai bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: My father has given me in marriage far away, and I shall not return to my parents' home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਪਿਰ ਲੋੜੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਜੋੜੀ ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਪਰਧਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: saache pir lorree preetam jorree mat pooree paradhaane |
lines.english: My True Beloved Husband Lord desires me; He has joined me to Himself, and made my intellect pure and sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਸੀ ਵੇਖਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਪਿਰਿ ਰਾਵੀ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਹੀਐ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rahasee vekh hadoor pir raavee ghar soheeai bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: I am delighted to see my Husband Lord near at hand; in His Home, I am so beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਪਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh sadaa sach palai sach bolai pir bhaae |
lines.english: I gather lasting Truth and contentment in my lap, and my Beloved is pleased with my truthful speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਮੇਲਾ ਥਾਨਿ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: sanjogee melaa thaan suhelaa gunavantee gur giaane |
lines.english: By good destiny I met Him, and was given a place of rest; through the Guru's Wisdom, I have become virtuous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak vichhurr naa dukh paae guramat ank samaae |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I shall not suffer the pain of separation; through the Guru's Teachings, I merge into the loving embrace of the Lord's Being. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਛੰਤੁ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 1 chhant ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, First Mehl, Chhant, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਏ ਪੰਚ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj milaae har man bhaae panch mile sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord automatically united me with them when it pleased Him; uniting with the chosen ones, I have found peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saachai mel milaae |
lines.english: The True Lord has united me with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: ham ghar saajan aae |
lines.english: My friends have come into my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਮੇਲੁ ਭਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਸੋਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: anadin mel bheaa man maaniaa ghar mandar sohaae |
lines.english: Meeting with them, night and day, my mind is pleased; my home and mansion are beautified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਵਸਤੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saaee vasat paraapat hoee jis setee man laaeaa |
lines.english: I have obtained that thing, which my mind desired.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਅਨਹਦ ਵਾਜੇ ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਆਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: panch sabad dhun anahad vaaje ham ghar saajan aae |1|
lines.english: The unstruck sound current of the Panch Shabad, the Five Primal Sounds, vibrates and resounds; my friends have come into my home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਨਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mangal gaavahu naare |
lines.english: And sing the songs of joy, O sisters.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਮੀਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu meet piaare |
lines.english: So come, my beloved friends,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਹੁ ਸੋਹਿਲੜਾ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sach mangal gaavahu taa prabh bhaavahu sohilarraa jug chaare |
lines.english: Sing the true songs of joy and God will be pleased. You shall be celebrated throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਥਾਨਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: apanai ghar aaeaa thaan suhaaeaa kaaraj sabad savaare |
lines.english: My Husband Lord has come into my home, and my place is adorned and decorated. Through the Shabad, my affairs have been resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਰਸਿ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਹਮ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sakhee milahu ras mangal gaavahu ham ghar saajan aaeaa |2|
lines.english: So join with me, my sisters, and sing the songs of joy and delight; my friends have come into my home. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਨੇਤ੍ਰੀ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਰੂਪੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: giaan mahaa ras netree anjan tribhavan roop dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: Applying the ointment, the supreme essence, of divine wisdom to my eyes, I see the Lord's form throughout the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਪਰਮ ਤਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: antar ratan padaarath merai param tat veechaaro |
lines.english: This invaluable jewel is deep within me; I contemplate the supreme essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਭਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan amrit bhinaa |
lines.english: My mind and body are drenched with Ambrosial Nectar;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਰਤੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar prem ratanaa |
lines.english: deep within the nucleus of my self, is the jewel of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਜਾਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: too jaan giaanee antarajaamee aape kaaran keenaa |
lines.english: You are Wise and All-knowing, the Inner-knower; You Yourself created the creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਤ ਭੇਖ ਤੂ ਸਫਲਿਓ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jant bhekh too safalio daataa sir sir devanahaaro |
lines.english: Living beings are mere beggars; You are the Giver of rewards; You are the Giver to each and every being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਹੁ ਸਖੀ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਨਿ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਭੀਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sunahu sakhee man mohan mohiaa tan man amrit bheenaa |3|
lines.english: So listen, O my sisters - the Enticer has enticed my mind. My body and mind are drenched with Nectar. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aatam raam sansaaraa |
lines.english: O Supreme Soul of the World,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਖੇਲੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਉਣੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sach khel tumaaraa agam apaaraa tudh bin kaun bujhaae |
lines.english: Your play is true, O Inaccessible and Infinite Lord; without You, who can make me understand?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa khel tumaaraa |
lines.english: Your play is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਆਣੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਵਣੁ ਕਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik siaane kete tujh bin kavan kahaae |
lines.english: There are millions of Siddhas and enlightened seekers, but without You, who can call himself one?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਬਿਕਾਲੁ ਭਏ ਦੇਵਾਨੇ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਠਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaal bikaal bhe devaane man raakhiaa gur tthaae |
lines.english: Death and rebirth drive the mind insane; only the Guru can hold it in its place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਵਗਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗਮਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak avagan sabad jalaae gun sangam prabh paae |4|1|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who burns away his demerits and faults with the Shabad, accumulates virtue, and finds God. ||4||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 1 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, First Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਘਨੇਰਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰਾ ਮੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: man chaau ghaneraa sun prabh meraa mai teraa bharavaasaa |
lines.english: My mind is filled with such a great yearning; hear me, O God - I place my faith in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਸਜਣਾ ਹਉ ਦੇਖਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu sajanaa hau dekhaa darasan teraa raam |
lines.english: Come, my friend, so that I may behold the blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਆਪਨੜੈ ਖੜੀ ਤਕਾ ਮੈ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਘਨੇਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ghar aapanarrai kharree takaa mai man chaau ghaneraa raam |
lines.english: I stand in my doorway, watching for You; my mind is filled with such a great yearning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਭਈ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: darasan dekh bhee nihakeval janam maran dukh naasaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, I have become free of desire; the pains of birth and death are taken away.
